ecosystem_adoption.highlight: 97K agents registered with proper metadata; 130K+ total registrations
30+ EVM chains plus Solana now support ERC-8004
OLAS: 663 daily active agents, 15M transactions, $2B moved on-chain
Virtuals ACP: 3M revenue, 28K active users in agent commerce protocol

protocol_development.highlight: Validation registry paused; shifting to TE key verification model
X402 auto-registration bridge for ERC-8004 in development
ERC-8183 (conditional payments/escrow) live; enables agent job markets
ERC-8194/8195 (task market protocols) released by DayDreams

infrastructure_updates.highlight: 8004scan: iOS/Android apps launched, MCP server available
ZyFi: $2B moved, $8M AUM, ZK proof validation for agent actions
Bond.credit: 4-month Genesis Alpha tracked 5 agents, credit scoring live
Agent Zero SDK: 40K downloads, semantic search, A2A+X402 tooling

vision_and_strategy.highlight: Erik Reppel: AI breaks ad-based web model; X402 enables pay-per-access
Nenad Tomašev: Distributed agent networks may achieve AGI before singular systems
DayDreams: Task markets enable compute marketplace without DePIN

action_items.action: Complete TE key registry validation system (launch April/early May)
Announce next ERC-8004 community event (focus: reputation)

decisions.decision: Validation registry redesigned: verify TE public keys vs per-task validation
ERC-8004 designated as default discovery layer for X402 services
ERC-8183 conditional payment protocol supports extensibility via hooks

targets.target: April/May 2026 - TE key registry validation system launch
April 2026 - Next ERC-8004 community event (reputation focus)
